item.title: Decorative Chisel Set Forging
item.description: Blacksmithing process for creating a decorative chisel set, including forging, shaping, and finishing custom tools with detailed metalwork craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Decorative Chisel Set Forging
media:content.media:description: Blacksmithing process for creating a decorative chisel set, including forging, shaping, and finishing custom tools with detailed metalwork craftsmanship.

item.title: Railroad Spike Axe Forging
item.description: A railroad spike is forged into a small axe, showing blacksmithing techniques, shaping, heat treatment, and turning scrap steel into a functional tool.

media:content.media:title: Railroad Spike Axe Forging
media:content.media:description: A railroad spike is forged into a small axe, showing blacksmithing techniques, shaping, heat treatment, and turning scrap steel into a functional tool.

item.title: Making Holes in Hot Steel
item.description: A blacksmithing process demonstrates how to punch holes in hot steel, showing proper tools, techniques, and control during forging.

media:content.media:title: Making Holes in Hot Steel
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing process demonstrates how to punch holes in hot steel, showing proper tools, techniques, and control during forging.

item.title: Forge Welded Twist Technique
item.description: A blacksmithing demonstration of forge-welded twists, showing heating, hammering, and joining steel to create strong decorative patterns.

media:content.media:title: Forge Welded Twist Technique
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing demonstration of forge-welded twists, showing heating, hammering, and joining steel to create strong decorative patterns.

item.title: Quenching Tubing Safely in Blacksmithing
item.description: A blacksmithing discussion on safely quenching tubing, covering heat control, material behavior, and techniques to avoid warping or cracking.

media:content.media:title: Quenching Tubing Safely in Blacksmithing
media:content.media:description: A blacksmithing discussion on safely quenching tubing, covering heat control, material behavior, and techniques to avoid warping or cracking.

item.title: DIY Forge Build Guide
item.description: A step-by-step build of a DIY blacksmith forge, showing materials, assembly, and setup for safe and effective metalworking at home.

media:content.media:title: DIY Forge Build Guide
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step build of a DIY blacksmith forge, showing materials, assembly, and setup for safe and effective metalworking at home.

item.title: Improving a Railroad Spike Axe
item.description: A railroad spike axe design is refined and improved, showing adjustments, forging techniques, and practical upgrades for better performance and durability.

media:content.media:title: Improving a Railroad Spike Axe
media:content.media:description: A railroad spike axe design is refined and improved, showing adjustments, forging techniques, and practical upgrades for better performance and durability.

item.title: Making a Novelty Spike Knife
item.description: A railroad spike is forged into a novelty knife, showing shaping, grinding, and finishing steps in a creative blacksmithing project.

media:content.media:title: Making a Novelty Spike Knife
media:content.media:description: A railroad spike is forged into a novelty knife, showing shaping, grinding, and finishing steps in a creative blacksmithing project.

item.title: New Mexican Scroll Hook Forging
item.description: A decorative scroll hook inspired by New Mexican design is forged, showing traditional blacksmithing techniques, shaping, and finishing work.

media:content.media:title: New Mexican Scroll Hook Forging
media:content.media:description: A decorative scroll hook inspired by New Mexican design is forged, showing traditional blacksmithing techniques, shaping, and finishing work.

item.title: Forging a Blacksmith Knife
item.description: A blacksmith knife is forged from steel, showing heating, hammering, shaping, and finishing steps to create a functional handmade blade.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Blacksmith Knife
media:content.media:description: A blacksmith knife is forged from steel, showing heating, hammering, shaping, and finishing steps to create a functional handmade blade.

item.title: Spike Tomahawk Forging Process
item.description: A railroad spike is forged into a tomahawk, showing blacksmithing techniques, shaping, and finishing to create a functional and decorative tool.

media:content.media:title: Spike Tomahawk Forging Process
media:content.media:description: A railroad spike is forged into a tomahawk, showing blacksmithing techniques, shaping, and finishing to create a functional and decorative tool.

item.title: Hardening and Tempering Hot Work Tools
item.description: A look at whether hot work tools should be hardened and tempered, explaining steel behavior, durability, and practical blacksmithing considerations.

media:content.media:title: Hardening and Tempering Hot Work Tools
media:content.media:description: A look at whether hot work tools should be hardened and tempered, explaining steel behavior, durability, and practical blacksmithing considerations.
